About the SBTI Personality Test

What is SBTI?

SBTI (Shit-Based Type Indicator) is an entertainment personality test based on 15 dimensions, featuring 30 standard questions plus 2 special questions (including 1 hidden trigger question), with a total of 27 personality types in the result library.

Unlike traditional MBTI, SBTI uses naming conventions rooted in Chinese internet culture — like CTRL (The Puppeteer), BOSS (The Leader), DRUNK (The Alcoholic) — making it much more relatable to young people.

The test includes the hidden personality DRUNK (triggered by a special question) and the fallback personality HHHH (assigned when standard personality match rates are very low), adding an element of fun and discovery to the whole experience.

Features of the SBTI Test

  • 15 Core Dimensions: Covering self, emotion, attitude, action, social, and more
  • 27 Personality Types: From CTRL (The Puppeteer) to DEAD (The Dead One), each with unique traits
  • Hidden Mechanics: Includes a special-trigger hidden personality and a system fallback personality
  • Visual Results: Each personality comes with a custom poster and detailed breakdown
  • Entertainment-First: Uses internet meme culture and slang for names that stick and spread

The Creator

SBTI was created by Bilibili content creator @蛆肉儿串儿 (UID417038183). It originally started as an attempt to convince a friend to quit drinking, and eventually evolved into a full personality test system.

Disclaimer

SBTI is purely for entertainment — don't take it seriously. The results don't represent the real you, shouldn't be used to define yourself or others, and absolutely should not be used for any commercial, medical, or psychological purposes. Keep a sense of humor, stay open-minded, and enjoy the ride!
SBTI Test
